5-Amino-1MQ: A small-molecule NNMT (nicotinamide N-methyltransferase) inhibitor studied in metabolic and cellular energy research.
ACE-031: An engineered soluble activin receptor type IIB (ActRIIB) fusion protein studied in myostatin-pathway and muscle-tissue research.
AHK-Cu: A copper-binding tripeptide (alanine-histidine-lysine) studied alongside GHK-Cu in skin and tissue-regeneration research.
AOD-9604: A modified fragment of human growth hormone (hGH 176-191) studied in lipid-metabolism research.
Adamax: A compounded research blend studied in metabolic research contexts.
Ara-290: A non-erythropoietic peptide derived from erythropoietin, studied in neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory research.
BPC-157: A synthetic pentadecapeptide extensively referenced in tissue-repair and recovery research literature.
BPC-157 + GHK-Cu + TB-500 + KPV Blend (K: A four-peptide research blend combining BPC-157, GHK-Cu, TB-500, and KPV, formulated for tandem research protocols examining tissue-repair pathways.
BPC-157 + GHK-Cu + TB-500 Blend (Glow): A three-peptide research blend combining BPC-157, GHK-Cu, and TB-500 for tandem tissue-repair and recovery research.
BPC-157 + TB-500 Blend: A dual-peptide blend pairing BPC-157 and TB-500, the combination most frequently referenced in regenerative-research literature.
Bacteriostatic Water: Sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol, used to reconstitute lyophilized peptides in laboratory settings.
CJC-1295 with DAC: A GHRH analog modified with a Drug Affinity Complex (DAC) for extended half-life, studied in growth-hormone secretion research.
CJC-1295 without DAC: A GHRH analog studied in growth-hormone secretion research, typically examined alongside a GHRP in research protocols.
CJC-1295 without DAC + Ipamorelin: A combination of a GHRH analog and a selective GHRP, one of the most-referenced pairings in growth-hormone-axis research literature.
Cagrilintide: A long-acting amylin analog studied in metabolic and appetite-regulation research, often examined alongside GLP-1 agonists.
Cagrilintide + Semaglutide: A combination research compound pairing an amylin analog with a GLP-1 receptor agonist, studied in metabolic research.
Cardiogen: A peptide bioregulator complex studied in cardiovascular tissue research.
DSIP: Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide, a naturally occurring neuropeptide studied in sleep-regulation and stress-response research.
Epithalon: A synthetic tetrapeptide (Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly) studied in telomerase-activity and cellular-aging research, originating from pineal-gland peptide research.
FOXO4-DRI: A peptide designed to disrupt the FOXO4-p53 interaction, studied in cellular-senescence research.
GHK-Cu: A naturally occurring copper-binding tripeptide, extensively studied in skin-regeneration, wound-healing, and collagen-synthesis research.
GHRP-2 Acetate: A growth hormone releasing peptide studied for its ghrelin-receptor agonist activity in growth-hormone secretion research.
GHRP-6 Acetate: A hexapeptide growth hormone secretagogue studied in growth-hormone-axis and appetite research.
Glutathione: A naturally occurring tripeptide antioxidant (glutamate-cysteine-glycine), studied in oxidative-stress and detoxification-pathway research.
HCG: Human chorionic gonadotropin, a glycoprotein hormone studied in reproductive-endocrinology research.
HGH Frag 176-191: A fragment of human growth hormone corresponding to amino acids 176-191, studied in lipolysis research.
Hexarelin Acetate: A synthetic hexapeptide growth hormone secretagogue studied in growth-hormone-axis and cardioprotective research.
IGF-1 LR3: A long-acting analog of insulin-like growth factor 1, studied in cellular-growth and muscle-tissue research.
Ipamorelin: A selective growth hormone secretagogue studied for ghrelin-mimetic activity with minimal reported effect on cortisol/prolactin in research literature.
KPV (Lys-Pro-Val): A tripeptide fragment of alpha-MSH studied in anti-inflammatory research.
Kisspeptin-10: A decapeptide fragment of kisspeptin, studied in reproductive-endocrinology and GnRH-pathway research.
LL-37: The active fragment of human cathelicidin, studied in antimicrobial-peptide and immune-response research.
Lemon Bottle: A research compound blend studied in lipolysis-related research contexts.
Lipo-C: A lipotropic compound blend studied in lipid-metabolism research.
MGF: Mechano Growth Factor, a splice variant of IGF-1 studied in muscle-tissue-repair research.
MOTS-c: A mitochondrial-derived peptide studied in metabolic and mitochondrial-function research.
Mazdutide: A dual GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist studied in metabolic research.
Melanotan I: A synthetic analog of alpha-MSH studied in melanocortin-receptor and pigmentation-pathway research.
Melanotan II: A synthetic analog of alpha-MSH studied in melanocortin-receptor research, including pigmentation and appetite pathways.
NA-Selank Amidate: A non-acetylated, amidated form of Selank, studied in anxiolytic and nootropic research.
NAD+: Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, a coenzyme studied in cellular-energy and aging research.
Oxytocin Acetate: A naturally occurring peptide hormone studied in social-bonding and neuroendocrine research.
PE 22-28: A fragment of the neuropeptide prolactin-releasing peptide, studied in mood and stress-response research.
PT-141: Bremelanotide, a melanocortin-receptor agonist studied in neuroendocrine research.
Pinealon: A synthetic tripeptide bioregulator studied in neuroprotective and cognitive research, related to pineal-gland peptide research.
Retatrutide: A triple agonist of GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, studied in next-generation metabolic and incretin research.
SLU-PP-332: A synthetic ERR agonist studied in exercise-mimetic and mitochondrial-biogenesis research.
SS-31: A mitochondria-targeted tetrapeptide studied in oxidative-stress and mitochondrial-function research.
Selank: A synthetic heptapeptide analog of tuftsin, studied in anxiolytic and stress-response research.
Semaglutide: A GLP-1 receptor agonist studied extensively in metabolic and incretin-pathway research.
Semax: A synthetic ACTH(4-10) analog studied in neurotrophic and cognitive-research literature.
Semax 10mg + Selank 10mg: A combination research compound pairing two heptapeptide nootropics studied in cognitive and stress-response research.
Semax 5mg + Selank 5mg: A combination research compound pairing two heptapeptide nootropics studied in cognitive and stress-response research, at a lower combined dose.
Sermorelin: A GHRH analog (amino acids 1-29) studied in growth-hormone secretion research.
Snap-8: A synthetic octapeptide studied in neuromuscular-signal and cosmetic-research contexts.
Survodutide: A dual GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist studied in metabolic research.
TB-500: A synthetic fragment of Thymosin Beta-4, studied in tissue-repair and cell-migration research.
Tesamorelin: A synthetic GHRH analog studied in growth-hormone secretion and lipodystrophy-related research.
Thymalin: A polypeptide complex studied in immune-modulation research.
Thymosin Alpha-1: An immunomodulatory peptide studied in immune-response research.
Tirzepatide: A dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist studied in next-generation metabolic and incretin research.
VIP: Vasoactive Intestinal Peptide, studied in neuroimmune and inflammatory-pathway research.
